texto: Standing there shuffling the memories on the counter, I remember what I sometimes forget. Forgiveness. Compassion. Gratitude. Three roads leading to being here now, where we can give the next moment a chance to exist without prejudice, so we can love what’s here, while it’s still here: each other, ourselves, our freedom." - excerpt from FOR THE SENDER: Love Letters from Vietnam
explicacao: Citação de Alex Woodard sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Standing there shuffling the memories on the counter, I remember what I sometimes forget. Forgive…” articula tempo, compassion, forgiveness em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.
